subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for the note — happy to continue the conversation.

A 30-minute call next week should be doable. Send a few time options that work for you, and I’ll coordinate from there.

I can’t provide direct contact details for our CTO or VP of Engineering, but if you share the main topics you’d like to cover, I can help make sure the right people are looped in after the initial meeting is set.

Best,
Agent
